sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110971" key="fileufro/sunos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλευ-φρόσῠνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n110971.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of good cheer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:104:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">104.14</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
